resources.string: Use Quick Connect to sign in without a password via your Jellyfin dashboard.
Enter this code in your browser
Items you mark as favorites will appear here
No playable item found on server
Your Jellyfin server doesn\'t have any libraries configured yet.
This library appears to be empty or the content hasn\'t been scanned yet.
Check back later for program listings
Configure Live TV on your Jellyfin server
Login to Seerr to request movies and TV shows
Check back later for new content
No movies found in this genre
No TV shows found in this genre
No audiobooks found in this genre
No podcasts found in this genre
Use a side drawer for navigation instead of the bottom bar
List your libraries in the drawer instead of on the home screen
Merge Movies and TV Shows into single lists
Show newest content first on home screen
Display IMDb and Rotten Tomatoes ratings on cards
Manage offline media and image caching
This download is on storage that isn\'t connected, so its files can\'t be deleted right now. Remove it from the list anyway? The files will remain on the storage if you reconnect it.
Downloading over mobile data may incur additional data charges from your carrier
Keep playing audio when screen is off
Hide title logo with player controls
Enter the details of your Jellyfin server
Could not reach server at any saved address
This address has been added to your existing server "%1$s".
This address is already saved for this server
Tap the + button to add your first Jellyfin server.
Are you sure you want to delete \"%1$s\"?
This will remove %1$d saved user(s) and all associated data.
Cannot delete the currently active server. Please switch to another server first.
MATCH — authentic build, safe to install
ERROR — could not read file, download again
Enter your server details to enable content requests
This app uses the following open source libraries
Login to a server to create a session
Disconnecting will remove your Audiobookshelf configuration. You can reconnect at any time.

AFinity uses notifications for music and audiobook playback controls (lock screen and notification shade) and to alert you when an app update is available.\n\nIf you change your mind later, you can enable it from App Info → Permissions → Notifications.
Authorize a sign-in request from another device
Enter the 6-digit code shown on the device requesting sign-in
Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
Share diagnostic logs for bug reports
Are you sure you want to log out? You will need to sign in again to access content.
Disconnecting will prevent you from making new requests. You can reconnect at any time.
Items you add to watchlist will appear here
Warning: Connecting over HTTP sends your password in plain text. HTTPS is highly recommended.
Restart %1$s? Active streams will be interrupted.
Shut down %1$s? The server will go offline completely.
Available for the active server only
You don\'t have enough requests remaining. Your quota resets automatically.
Version %1$s is now available. Tap to download.
Failed to check Live TV access
Content not available on this server
Server not found. Please login again.
Saved session expired. Please login again.
Login succeeded but user ID or token was missing.
Failed to start Quick Connect. Please try again.
This will permanently remove the image from the server.
Plays tracks similar to the seed, sourced from Jellyfin\'s Instant Mix
Each new track is similar to the previous one, flowing naturally
Queues full albums that are similar to the seed album
Reshuffles the source tracks on repeat, like shuffle-repeat
Picks tracks randomly from the source, duplicates allowed
